evidenceRanking.reason: Existing loopback client, diagnostics, streaming, cancellation, and structured-output foundations provide the shortest path to a real closed runtime.
Phase 0 closes the principal policy contract, but runtime telemetry and persistent audit storage remain future work.
Existing foundations should be connected after one real closed runtime is proven.
No installed browser model runtime was demonstrated.
Current evidence is contract-only and depends on private infrastructure.
